hooks.command:
cat ai/README.md 2>/dev/null && printf '
---
SPECIALISM ROUTING: Identify the matching specialism in ai/ for this task. If one clearly matches, READ its full XML file (ai/<name>.xml) before acting and follow its task/workflow/rubric/formatting. If no specialism clearly matches, STOP and use AskUserQuestion to ask the user to choose: (a) pick one of the listed specialisms to apply anyway, or (b) approve a new specialism to be added (propose a name and one-line scope). Do NOT proceed with the task until the user has chosen.
' && latest=$(ls -d ai/repo-summary-[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9]-[0-9][0-9] 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -n1); if [ -z "$latest" ]; then printf '
---
REPO SUMMARY: none found. If repo navigation will help this task, suggest the user run "generate repo summary".
'; else date_part="${latest#ai/repo-summary-}"; ts=$(date -d "$date_part" +%s 2>/dev/null); now=$(date +%s); if [ -z "$ts" ] || [ $((now - ts)) -gt $((30 * 86400)) ]; then printf '
---
REPO SUMMARY: latest snapshot %s is stale (>30d). Suggest running "generate repo summary" before any cross-cutting task.
' "$latest"; fi; fi
julia --project=.dev .dev/climaformat.jl . 2>/dev/null || echo 'Formatting skipped as error encountered when calling `julia --project=.dev .dev/climaformat.jl`'
